title: Expert Diagnosis Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of expert diagnosis in algorithmic game theory, where a principal uses reports from self-interested experts to diagnose a system's state.
relationships: Principal hires experts to observe the system
Experts observe private signals about the system's true state
Experts strategically report signals (may lie) to the Principal
Principal aggregates reports using a payment mechanism to incentivize truth-telling
Principal makes a final diagnosis based on the aggregated information
